We combine premium raw materials, advanced manufacturing technology, and close customer support to deliver outstanding results for every project.

items.question: What is ACM and where can it be used?
items.answer: ACM (Aluminum Composite Material) is a panel composed of two aluminum sheets with a polyethylene core. It is widely used in ventilated façades, interior cladding, signage, visual communication, and urban furniture due to its lightweight, flatness, and durability.

items.question: What is the difference between polyester ACM and Kynar ACM?
items.answer: Polyester ACM is recommended for indoor use with moderate weather resistance. Kynar ACM features a fluoropolymer coating with high UV, corrosion, and wear resistance, making it ideal for exterior façades exposed to harsh weather conditions.

items.question: What is the ideal thickness for façades?
items.answer: For exterior façades, we recommend 4mm panels with aluminum layers from 0.30mm to 0.50mm. For indoor use or visual communication, 3mm thickness is sufficient. Our technical team can recommend the best specification for each project.

items.question: Do you process the ACM panels in-house?
items.answer: Yes. We perform CNC cutting, bending, milling, machining, and tray preparation in our own factory. This guarantees millimeter precision and faster installation on site.

items.question: What are the delivery deadlines?
items.answer: The delivery period is 90 calendar days after final measurements. Any different deadline will be defined after technical analysis and agreed upon by all parties involved.

items.question: Which regions do you deliver to?
items.answer: We provide national and international shipping. We work with specialized logistics for flat materials and use high-security technical packaging, ensuring the integrity of the panels throughout the entire transportation process.

items.question: How does the warranty work?
items.answer: Our panels come with up to a 10-year warranty for architectural projects, depending on the chosen finish. We provide complete technical documentation and after-sales support.

history.title: OUR BRAND
history.subtitle: Bringing quality ACM
history.paragraph1: From the beginning, our mission has always been to raise the standard of architectural cladding, offering ACM solutions that combine durability, aesthetics, and innovation. We operate with a focus on excellence, from material selection to final delivery, ensuring results that enhance every project.
history.paragraph2: With a trajectory built on trust and commitment, we constantly seek to evolve our processes and keep up with market trends. Our goal is to provide customers not just a product, but a complete experience, with specialized technical support and attention to every detail.
history.paragraph3: We are consolidating our presence in the sector through solid partnerships and successful projects. We continue to work with dedication to transform ideas into reality, delivering quality that stands out and adds value in every application.
